name: Landis
bio: When Helmut fell, so too did the last restraint within Landis. His form, once brittle and dimly burning, erupted in a maelstrom of fire and grief. His voice, once soft and sorrowful, became a howl of molten fury. In this state, Landis was no longer a king or man—he was vengeance incarnate.

His flames scorched stone and steel alike, his magic pushed beyond mortal limits. And yet, amid the inferno, his tears never stopped falling. Enraged Landis was not evil, nor mad—he was simply broken, aflame with all the love and loyalty Valkorath had failed to protect.
